ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine sample */,
  "category" INTEGER /* ID of the wine category */,
  "type" INTEGER /* ID of the wine type */,
  "quality_rating" REAL /* Quality rating of the wine (e.g., 0-10) */,
  "technical_sheet" TEXT /* File path to the technical sheet for the wine sample */,
  "vintage_year" INTEGER /* The year the wine was produced */,
  "origin" TEXT /* The region or country where the wine is from */,
  "producer" TEXT /* The name of the winery or producer */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* The size of the bottle (e.g., 750ml, 1.5L) */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Whether the wine is currently available for analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the wine sample data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., red, white, sparkling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Chardonnay, Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating entry */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample the rating belongs to */,
  "quality_rating" REAL /* Quality rating of the wine (e.g., 0-10) */,
  "date_rated" TEXT /* The date when the quality rating was given */,
  "rater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the wine */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_rater_id FOREIGN KEY ("rater_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, winemaker) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
